title: REST Endpoint for Adding Users via Stripe Webhook and Salesforce
description:
Create a REST endpoint that allows adding additional users to a tenant. This endpoint will serve two integration flows:

1. **Stripe Integration** — When someone purchases a subscription via Stripe, the webhook triggers this endpoint to provision user access on the tenant.
2. **Salesforce Admin Integration** — Salesforce administrators can manually add users to a tenant through this endpoint when needed.

The endpoint must support both automated webhook calls and manual admin invocations.
acceptance_criteria: REST endpoint accepts a request to add a user to a specified tenant
Stripe webhook can trigger the endpoint on purchase events
Salesforce admin interface can call the endpoint to manually add users
Endpoint validates the tenant and user data before provisioning
Appropriate error responses for invalid requests
middleware_changes: New user provisioning logic that handles tenant lookup, user creation, and role assignment when triggered by Stripe or Salesforce.
data_model_changes: User record creation with tenant association.
api_changes: New REST endpoint for adding users to a tenant, accepting user details and tenant identifier.
implementation_notes: Endpoint needs to be secured and support both Stripe webhook signatures and Salesforce admin authentication.
